MPS

Sold Separately

  • MR-16 Halogens - 12 Volt, 35 Watt Max
  • MR-16 LED's - 8-25 VAC
FEATURES
  • Solid Copper Construction
  • Solid Brass Adjustable Arm
  • PVC Ground Stake Included
OPTIONAL MOUNTING ACCESSORIES
  • Aluminum Brown Tree Mount
    (Up Lighting Only)
  • Brass Ground Stake
    (Threaded/Non-Threaded)
  • Brass Deep Mount or Shallow Mount
    (Threaded/Non-Threaded)
  • Copper 0.75" or 1" Threaded Risers
    (Cut to any length)
